supplier.name: Vadodara Specialty Chemicals Pvt Ltd
supplier.profile_semantic: Specialty chemical plant in the GIDC industrial estates of Vadodara, Gujarat, India. Manufactures food-grade emulsifier blends (E471 mono- and diglycerides with E414 gum acacia) for beverage and bakery applications. Sole-source producer of Northwind Provisions' emulsifier feedstock. Monsoon-flood-prone low-lying estate.

supplier.name: Asha Food Ingredients Ltd
supplier.profile_semantic: Tier-1 ingredient blender in Navi Mumbai, India, compounding emulsifier systems and dry-blend premixes for granola and snack-bar production lines. Receives emulsifier feedstock from Gujarat by road.
